headline: Embecta to Acquire Owen Mumford to Expand Drug-Delivery Portfolio
summary: EMBC to acquire Owen Mumford for up to $199.4M, aiming to expand beyond diabetes into high-value drug delivery and boost long-term growth.

headline: Intuitive Surgical vs. Stryker: Which Surgical Tech Stock Leads?
summary: ISRG outpaces SYK with stronger growth, robotic surgery dominance, and recurring revenue strength, highlighting its edge in MedTech innovation and market leadership.

headline: ECL to Boost Data Center AI Cooling Platform With CoolIT Acquisition
summary: Ecolab's $4.75B CoolIT deal boosts its AI data center cooling push, expanding into high-growth liquid cooling and unlocking recurring revenue opportunities.

raw.headline: ECL to Boost Data Center AI Cooling Platform With CoolIT Acquisition

headline: ISRG- Not Cheap, But Delivering on Growth Expectations
summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (ISRG) is still expanding the reach of its da Vinci surgical system. This Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) stock is expected to grow earnings in the double-digits in 2026 and 2027, highlights Tracey Ryniec, senior stock strategist at Zacks Investment Research.
